Notes: Single UPDATE attempts to add a CNAME at an owner that already has an A RR, while simultaneously deleting that A rrset. Servers may differ on whether they evaluate CNAME exclusivity against the pre-update state or the final state.

Steps.Description: At cnameX.campus.edu., add a CNAME to target.campus.edu. and delete the existing A rrset in the same UPDATE.

Steps.Name: cnameX.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the CNAME was installed.

Steps.Name: cnameX.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the old A rrset remains absent.
